We value your privacy and strive to protect your personal data.
                          By clicking 'I agree' below, you acknowledge that you have read and consent to our
                          Privacy Policy, which details the data we collect,
                          how it's processed, and the measures we take to keep it secure. Your consent also enables us to provide you with personalized services and offers.
                          We are fully GDPR and SOC2 compliant.
